summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Custom Saved Filter Views feature for Value Bet Intelligence app. Backend API endpoints (GET/POST/PATCH/DELETE /api/profile/saved-views) working correctly with eviction logic, sport validation, and user isolation. Frontend UI fully functional with Sheet component, built-in presets, user views management (save/apply/rename/update/delete), and backend persistence.

minor_issues.issue: Returns 502 during test (environment startup issue, not related to saved-views)
CSV export test check failed (header validation issue in test, actual CSV is correct)

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/profile/saved-views returns {items, max: 10}
Backend: POST /api/profile/saved-views creates view with name, filters, enginePreset, sport
Backend: POST with >10 views evicts oldest and returns _evicted_id
Backend: PATCH /api/profile/saved-views/{id} updates name independently
Backend: PATCH /api/profile/saved-views/{id} updates filters independently
Backend: PATCH /api/profile/saved-views/{id} updates enginePreset independently
Backend: PATCH with non-existent view_id returns 404
Backend: DELETE /api/profile/saved-views/{id} deletes correctly
Backend: DELETE with non-existent view_id returns 404
Backend: Sport validation - invalid sport (cricket) returns 400
Backend: Sport validation - football accepted
Backend: Sport validation - basketball accepted
Backend: Sport validation - baseball accepted
Backend: User isolation - user2 sees 0 views when user1 has 10
Backend: User isolation - user2 cannot PATCH user1's view (404)
Backend: User isolation - user2 cannot DELETE user1's view (404)
Backend: Auth protection - GET /api/profile/saved-views requires token (401)
Frontend: Sheet opens with 'Vistas' button (data-testid='saved-views-open-button')
Frontend: BUILT-IN section displays 3 presets (Alta confianza, Solo mercados protegidos, Solo en vivo)
Frontend: TUS VISTAS section displays correctly
Frontend: Counter shows X/10 format (data-testid='saved-views-counter')
Frontend: Save new view - creates via POST with name, filters, enginePreset, sport
Frontend: Save new view - shows 'Vista guardada' toast
Frontend: Saved view appears in list after creation
Frontend: Apply saved view - applies filters and shows 'Vista aplicada' toast
Frontend: Rename view - inline edit with Pencil icon (data-testid='rename-view-{id}')
Frontend: Rename view - Enter confirms, shows 'Vista renombrada' toast
Frontend: Update filters button (Save icon, data-testid='update-filters-{id}') updates view via PATCH
Frontend: Update filters - shows 'Vista actualizada' toast
Frontend: Delete button (Trash icon, data-testid='delete-view-{id}') deletes via DELETE
Frontend: Delete - shows 'Vista eliminada' toast
Frontend: Delete - counter updates correctly (1/10 → 0/10)
Frontend: Persistence - views reload from backend after page refresh (no LocalStorage)
Frontend: Sheet closes with 'Cerrar' button (data-testid='saved-views-close')
Frontend: All data-testid attributes present for testing

success_percentage.backend: 97.1% (67/69 tests passed - 2 failures unrelated to saved-views)

not_tested: Frontend: Limit warning (data-testid='saved-views-limit-warning') when at 10/10 and trying to save 11th - backend eviction works, but UI warning display not fully verified
Frontend: Eviction toast message when saving 11th view - backend returns _evicted_id correctly, but specific toast message not verified
additional_notes.app_language: Spanish (ES) - all UI text in Spanish as expected
screenshots: .screenshots/saved-views-sheet.png - Initial sheet with built-in views and saved view
.screenshots/saved-views-after-save.png - After saving new view with toast
